summary: User Lookup | Email Search Without Date Selection
gherkin:
When the user navigate to User Lookup page
And the user verify no dates are selected in calendar
And the user enter "dm5tv@gmail.com" in the email field
And the user click on Search button
Then the User Lookup page loads successfully
And the Date range field is empty or shows no selection
And the Email address is entered successfully
And the Search executes successfully
And the user Verify "External Logs" text appears "External Logs" section is displayed
And the user Verify "User Information" table loads with correct columns  Table shows:
* First Name
* Last Name
* Okta ID
* Email
* Do Not Sell
* Favorite Team
* Entitlements
And the user Verify "User Sessions" table is present User Sessions table is visible
And the user Verify no error messages are displayed  No error messages or warnings appear

steps.action:

*And* the user verify no dates are selected in calendar

*And* the user click on Search button

* Do Not Sell
